title: Error at ICE40_DSP pass: coAssert `nusers(O.extract_end(i)) <= 1' failed in ./passes/pmgen/ice40_dsp_pm.h:388.
body:
### Version

Yosys 0.37 (git sha1 a5c7f69ed8f, gcc 13.2.0 -fPIC -Os)

### On which OS did this happen?

Linux

### Reproduction Steps

1. Create a file with the contents shown at the end of this section
2. `read_verilog top.v` `synth_ice40 -dsp`
3. ???
4. ERROR: Assert \`nusers(O.extract_end(i)) <= 1' failed in ./passes/pmgen/ice40_dsp_pm.h:388.`

The following is a highly cut-down version of the composite signal generation used by the [X16Community/vera-module](https://github.com/X16Community/vera-module)
```verilog
//`default_nettype none

module top(
    input  wire        clk,
    // Line buffer / palette interface
    input  wire [3:0] i1,
    input  wire [3:0] i2,
    // Composite interface
    output wire  [5:0] luma,) /* synthesis syn_hier = "hard" */;

    video_modulator modulator(
        .clk(clk),
        .i1(i1),
        .i2(i2),
        .luma(luma));
endmodule

module video_modulator(
    input  wire        clk,
    input  wire  [3:0] i1,
    input  wire  [3:0] i2,
    output reg   [5:0] luma) /* synthesis syn_hier = "hard" */;

    wire [15:0] o1, o2;
    // We use one DSP for two 8x8 unsigned multiplications
    video_modulator_mult_u8xu8_pair video_modulator_mult_yg_yr (
        .clk(clk),
        // Y_G_times_g_16 = Y_G * g
        .input_2a_8(53),
        .input_2b_8({4'b0000, i1}),
        .output_2_16(o1),
        // Y_R_times_r_16 = Y_R * r
        .input_1a_8(27),
        .input_1b_8({4'b0000, i2}),
        .output_1_16(o2)
    );
    always @* begin
        luma = o1 + o2;
    end
endmodule

module video_modulator_mult_u8xu8_pair (
    input  wire        clk,
    input  wire [7:0] input_1a_8,
    input  wire [7:0] input_1b_8,
    input  wire [7:0] input_2a_8,
    input  wire [7:0] input_2b_8,
    output wire [15:0] output_1_16,
    output wire [15:0] output_2_16);

    wire        [31:0] output_32;
    assign output_1_16 = output_32[15:0];
    assign output_2_16 = output_32[31:16];

    SB_MAC16 mult8x8 ( // port interfaces
        .A({input_2a_8, input_1a_8}), .B({input_2b_8, input_1b_8}),
        .C(16'b0), .D(16'b0), .O(output_32),
        .CLK(clk), .CE(1'b1),
        .IRSTTOP(1'b0), .IRSTBOT(1'b0),
        .ORSTTOP(1'b0), .ORSTBOT(1'b0),
        .AHOLD(1'b0), .BHOLD(1'b0), .CHOLD(1'b0), .DHOLD(1'b0),
        .OHOLDTOP(1'b0), .OHOLDBOT(1'b0),
        .OLOADTOP(1'b0), .OLOADBOT(1'b0),
        .ADDSUBTOP(1'b0), .ADDSUBBOT(1'b0),
        .CO(),
        .CI(1'b0),
        .ACCUMCI(1'b0),
        .ACCUMCO(),
        .SIGNEXTIN(1'b0),
        .SIGNEXTOUT()
    );
    defparam mult8x8.TOPOUTPUT_SELECT = 2'b10; //Mult8x8 data output
    defparam mult8x8.BOTOUTPUT_SELECT = 2'b10; //Mult8x8 data output
    defparam mult8x8.A_SIGNED = 1'b0; //Unsigned Inputs
    defparam mult8x8.B_SIGNED = 1'b0; //Unsigned Inputs

endmodule
```

### Expected Behavior

No crash, synthesis would complete or at least fail with a proper error message.

### Actual Behavior

Crash during synthesis. Likely related to #1480
code_blocks:
//`default_nettype none

module top(
    input  wire        clk,
    // Line buffer / palette interface
    input  wire [3:0] i1,
    input  wire [3:0] i2,
    // Composite interface
    output wire  [5:0] luma,) /* synthesis syn_hier = "hard" */;

    video_modulator modulator(
        .clk(clk),
        .i1(i1),
        .i2(i2),
        .luma(luma));
endmodule

module video_modulator(
    input  wire        clk,
    input  wire  [3:0] i1,
    input  wire  [3:0] i2,
    output reg   [5:0] luma) /* synthesis syn_hier = "hard" */;

    wire [15:0] o1, o2;
    // We use one DSP for two 8x8 unsigned multiplications
    video_modulator_mult_u8xu8_pair video_modulator_mult_yg_yr (
        .clk(clk),
        // Y_G_times_g_16 = Y_G * g
        .input_2a_8(53),
        .input_2b_8({4'b0000, i1}),
        .output_2_16(o1),
        // Y_R_times_r_16 = Y_R * r
        .input_1a_8(27),
        .input_1b_8({4'b0000, i2}),
        .output_1_16(o2)
    );
    always @* begin
        luma = o1 + o2;
    end
endmodule

module video_modulator_mult_u8xu8_pair (
    input  wire        clk,
    input  wire [7:0] input_1a_8,
    input  wire [7:0] input_1b_8,
    input  wire [7:0] input_2a_8,
    input  wire [7:0] input_2b_8,
    output wire [15:0] output_1_16,
    output wire [15:0] output_2_16);

    wire        [31:0] output_32;
    assign output_1_16 = output_32[15:0];
    assign output_2_16 = output_32[31:16];

    SB_MAC16 mult8x8 ( // port interfaces
        .A({input_2a_8, input_1a_8}), .B({input_2b_8, input_1b_8}),
        .C(16'b0), .D(16'b0), .O(output_32),
        .CLK(clk), .CE(1'b1),
        .IRSTTOP(1'b0), .IRSTBOT(1'b0),
        .ORSTTOP(1'b0), .ORSTBOT(1'b0),
        .AHOLD(1'b0), .BHOLD(1'b0), .CHOLD(1'b0), .DHOLD(1'b0),
        .OHOLDTOP(1'b0), .OHOLDBOT(1'b0),
        .OLOADTOP(1'b0), .OLOADBOT(1'b0),
        .ADDSUBTOP(1'b0), .ADDSUBBOT(1'b0),
        .CO(),
        .CI(1'b0),
        .ACCUMCI(1'b0),
        .ACCUMCO(),
        .SIGNEXTIN(1'b0),
        .SIGNEXTOUT()
    );
    defparam mult8x8.TOPOUTPUT_SELECT = 2'b10; //Mult8x8 data output
    defparam mult8x8.BOTOUTPUT_SELECT = 2'b10; //Mult8x8 data output
    defparam mult8x8.A_SIGNED = 1'b0; //Unsigned Inputs
    defparam mult8x8.B_SIGNED = 1'b0; //Unsigned Inputs

endmodule
